external_teacher_score: clean frozen CLIP crop cosine; not method.semantic_encoder

allowed_feature_sources.coord_score_norm: free rollout coordinate plausibility over candidate mask
allowed_feature_sources.tusb_semantic_target_score_norm: TUSB semantic target token candidate score
allowed_feature_sources.external_rank_score: rank feature derived from clean external teacher score
allowed_feature_sources.external_margin_to_top: margin from clean external top candidate
allowed_feature_sources.coord_rank_score: rank feature derived from coordinate score

prohibited_sources: future target mask overlap as feature
semantic teacher score duplicated as final base
